bugs.title: Mobile mega menu opens from wrong state / inconsistent top position
bugs.before: Submenu open/close state and top-position behavior were inconsistent across reopen/overlay states near mobile breakpoint boundary.
bugs.after: JS threshold normalization to 1024 reduced branch mismatch and improved overlay state consistency, but hostile replay for back/reopen is still incomplete.
reproduce_steps: Close menu, scroll page, reopen menu.
bugs.remaining_risk: Back/reopen state drift may still appear in edge navigation paths.

bugs.title: Sticky header proportions/buttons look uneven on mobile
bugs.before: Action controls had mixed sizes (34/36/40/44), uneven rhythm, and inconsistent header proportion.
bugs.after: Controls normalized to 44x44, header tokens moved to 56/48, critical CSS aligned to product sizing intent.
bugs.remaining_risk: Visual signoff on exact pixels still pending because baseline snapshots are untrusted.

bugs.title: Sticky PDP CTA can be dishonest (label vs action)
bugs.before: Risk that sticky CTA behavior differs from promise under overlay/reopen conditions.
bugs.after: No direct PDP CTA runtime fix in this cycle.
reproduce_steps: Scroll until sticky CTA is active.
Open/close header overlays, then tap sticky CTA.
Verify that action is real add-to-cart, not unrelated scroll/focus.
bugs.remaining_risk: High: product_accept cannot be true while this remains unresolved.

bugs.title: Mobile search not fully aligned with desktop interaction language
bugs.before: Search open/close logic had boundary mismatch with CSS contract around 1024/1025.
bugs.after: JS normalized to DESKTOP_MIN=1024 and branch consistency improved, but parity replay remains incomplete.
reproduce_steps: Repeat at 1024 parity viewport and compare behavior.
bugs.remaining_risk: Some first/second-open parity gaps may remain until full hostile replay passes.

bugs.title: Cart mobile visual hierarchy is unstable
bugs.before: Cart badge could be hidden at <=600 and cart trigger geometry drifted from adjacent controls.
bugs.after: Badge remains visible with compact sizing on narrow screens; cart trigger normalized to 44x44 pattern.
reproduce_steps: Compare cart button geometry to neighbor controls.
bugs.remaining_risk: Visual signoff still required for final pixel acceptance.
